evals.name: Role-Based Access Control
evals.description: Test review of RBAC implementation in multi-role app
evals.prompt: Review the authorization logic for this admin/user/guest system.
evals.expected_output: Structured authorization review that identifies access-control risks, affected roles or resources, evidence, severity, and remediation guidance.

assertions.description: 识别角色、资源、权限边界和关键授权路径
assertions.text: 识别角色、资源、权限边界和关键授权路径

assertions.description: 指出越权、会话、JWT 或权限检查缺陷
assertions.text: 指出越权、会话、JWT 或权限检查缺陷

assertions.description: 说明证据、影响范围和风险后果
assertions.text: 说明证据、影响范围和风险后果

assertions.description: 提供可执行的授权修复和回归验证建议
assertions.text: 提供可执行的授权修复和回归验证建议
